case_title: LE VAN VS MAGNA GALLERY INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LE VAN AS TO DEFENDANT MAGNA GALLERY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
